      *,

      html {

      body {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-rows: auto auto 1fr auto;
        grid-template-columns: 100%;
        min-height: 100%;
        margin: 0;
        font-size: 1.5rem;

        line-height: calc(1 + 0.8 / var(--font-body-scale));
        font-family: var(--font-body-family);
        font-style: var(--font-body-style);
        font-weight: var(--font-body-weight);

  (function() {
    class CollectionNavad0jnmllldfvkelfltaigenblock3d8491exdeyrc extends HTMLElement {
      constructor() {
        super();
      }

      connectedCallback() {
        this.wrapper = this.querySelector('.ai-collection-nav-wrapper-ad0jnmllldfvkelfltaigenblock3d8491exdeyrc');
        this.links = this.querySelectorAll('.ai-collection-nav-link-ad0jnmllldfvkelfltaigenblock3d8491exdeyrc');
        this.setupActiveState();
      }

      setupActiveState() {
        const currentPath = window.location.pathname;
        
        this.links.forEach((link) => {
          link.classList.remove('active');
          
          if (link.getAttribute('href') === currentPath) {
            link.classList.add('active');
          }
        });
      }
    }

    customElements.define('collection-nav-ad0jnmllldfvkelfltaigenblock3d8491exdeyrc', CollectionNavad0jnmllldfvkelfltaigenblock3d8491exdeyrc);
